text:
Created attachment 223128
svn diff

Update to 1.9.0

There's a new dependency (archivers/py-brotli), both ports depending on py-flask-compress (graphics/py-hiplot and www/flexget) seem to be fine with the new version, as per upstream requirements.txt/setup.py.

Changes:

https://github.com/colour-science/flask-compress/blob/v1.9.0/CHANGELOG.md

Most notable is added support for different compression algorithms.
